name: Real Clique Credit Repair
description_short: Miami-based credit repair firm disputing negative items with all 3 bureaus and creditors. Charges $99/mo + $200 setup; no BBB accreditation; FL corp status inactive since 2023.
description_long:
Real Clique Credit Repair was incorporated in Florida in September 2016 and began client operations in October 2017. Headquartered in Miami at 10300 SW 72nd St, Suite 190, the company operates under the BBB classification of "Credit Repair – Advanced Fee." Leadership consists of President Humberto Marquez and Vice Presidents Christopher Carbone and Felix Velazquez. The firm holds no recognized industry certifications — it is not CDFI-designated, HUD-approved, or an NFCC member. A material legal note: Florida Sunbiz records show the company's corporate registration was administratively dissolved on September 22, 2023, for failure to file its annual report, meaning its legal corporate status with the State of Florida is currently inactive.

Real Clique's core service is disputing negative items on clients' credit reports with all three major bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion — as well as directly with original creditors. Their stated scope covers collections, late payments, charge-offs, and hard inquiry removal. The company also offers credit building guidance for clients looking to establish positive payment history. Pricing consists of a $200 one-time setup fee and $99 per month, with a reported 6-month minimum commitment, putting the floor cost of engagement at approximately $794 with no results guaranteed.

What distinguishes Real Clique, at least by consumer volume, is a strong review profile: 4.7 stars from 251 Google reviews, 4.9 stars across 733 Birdeye reviews, and a 5-star Yelp listing updated as recently as March 2026. The company emphasizes personalized, individually prepared dispute letters — rather than bulk automated template filings — and claims no cap on the number of disputes submitted per month. Their Miami-area, in-person presence appeals to local consumers who prefer face-to-face engagement over purely remote services.

The honest picture is more mixed. No money-back guarantee has been confirmed in any public source. The BBB rates them C+ without accreditation, and the corporate dissolution from 2023 is a real flag — consumers should independently verify the company's current legal and registration status before signing a contract. At least one documented consumer complaint describes paying $99/month for six months with no score improvement and difficulty canceling recurring charges. The high review counts on third-party platforms are promising, but the combination of no guarantee, no certification, an inactive state registration, and a below-average BBB rating warrants due diligence.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee confirmed in any public source. Contact provider for current terms.

pros: 4.9-star average across 733 Birdeye reviews and 4.7/5 on Google from 251 reviews — unusually high review volume for a local credit repair firm
Disputes submitted to all three major credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion) AND directly to original creditors
Claims individually prepared, hard-copy dispute letters rather than automated template-based filings
No stated cap on the number of disputes submitted per month
Local Miami presence allows in-person consultations — rare among credit repair providers
Over 8 years of operating history since 2017 in a sector with high turnover
cons: Florida corporate registration administratively dissolved September 22, 2023 — the company's legal status with the State of Florida is currently inactive
BBB rating of C+ with no BBB accreditation
Reported 6-month minimum commitment at $99/month plus $200 setup fee — minimum engagement cost is approximately $794
No money-back guarantee confirmed in any public source
At least one consumer complaint documents zero score improvement after 6 months of payments and difficulty canceling the monthly charge
best_for: Miami-area consumers who prefer working with a local, in-person credit repair provider
Consumers with multiple negative items (collections, charge-offs, late payments) who want bureau AND creditor-level disputes
Individuals who are skeptical of automated, template-driven dispute services and want personalized letters
Consumers willing to commit to a 6-month engagement and who have verified the company's current legal standing
diagnosis: Real Clique Credit Repair is best suited for Miami-area consumers with damaged credit who want a locally accessible, high-touch dispute service and are prepared for a 6-month, ~$794 minimum commitment with no guarantee of results. The main caveat is significant: the company's Florida corporate registration has been administratively dissolved since September 2023, and its BBB rating is C+ without accreditation — consumers should independently verify its current legal status before signing up or providing payment information.
services: Negative item removal — collections, charge-offs, late payments
Credit bureau disputes — Equifax, Experian, TransUnion
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
quarantine_reason: Website hacked — serving cialis/spam content. Delisted 2026-04-01.
